Day advanced to 2026-03-23.
7,068 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
16 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 2 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-24): ['200605', '240291']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-22 -> 2026-03-23)

- "By March 2026, which country will Afghanistan's Foreign Ministry say facilitated Dennis Coyle's release on humanitarian grounds?" → United Arab Emirates
- "Which country will IQAir rank as the world's most polluted for 2025 in its annual air-quality report by March 2026?" → Pakistan
- "Which IPL franchise will be bought by the consortium including David Blitzer's Bolt Ventures by 31 March 2026?" → Royal Challengers Bengaluru
- "Which city will IQAir identify as the world’s most polluted city in its annual 2025 air quality report, expected by March 2026?" → Loni
- "What country will Alexander Lukashenko make his first official visit to during the week ending 31 March 2026?" → North Korea

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 306 (314 resolved, 16 active)
- accuracy: 8.2% | brier skill score: -0.106 | time weighted score: -1115.92
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
